title: Plastic Better Leaves x Bare Bones
description: Better looking leaves for Bare Bones x The Aether and Bare Bones x Alex's Caves
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NVyoHhzF/images/89eb52c8cb5887ab91a2f0c2e4601eeb98d05797.png)


## **вҠұ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ {вӢ…. вңҜ .вӢ…} в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҠ°**

 > **Some textures I added for an upcoming modpack. I didn't like how the leaves for the Bare Bones x Aether/Alex's Caves resource packs looked, so I made this :)
It's meant to go with the Plastic texture pack as a base, but you can use this with the base Bare Bones instead, if you like!**
